name: Shelly's Dream
description: Shelly didn’t mean to fall asleep, but now she can’t wake up. The dreamscape around her shifts with every step, twisting familiar places into uncanny echoes. The only way out is forward, but each stage brings her face‑to‑face with someone she knows… or once knew. Their smiles are wrong. Their voices glitch. Their movements sync to a rhythm she can’t ignore. If Shelly wants to return to the real world, she’ll have to fight through the nightmare and confront the truth hiding beneath it.
